user.title: Connect your Cync account
user.description: Enter the email and password you use for the GE / Savant Cync app.

otp.title: Two-factor code
otp.description: Cync emailed you a one-time code. Enter it below.

error.invalid_otp: That code didn't work. Check your email and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Cync cloud. Please try again.

abort.already_configured: This Cync account is already configured.
